rows.protocol_note: SeedClawBench uses an Agent-as-Judge automatic evaluation protocol; judge reads transcript, tool trace, final deliverable, and external state snapshots, then calls read-only tools. Separate internal text and multimodal judging pipelines are used. Initial human-machine agreement study: 37 tasks, 262 rubric items, 89.69% agreement.
